subject: Scientific Protein Laboratories
sought: any audited annual financial statements for SPL, a flagged chokepoint
searched: SEC EDGAR full-text and company search; general web search for SPL annual accounts; its parent Shenzhen Hepalink's disclosures
found_instead: SPL is privately held and has been a subsidiary of Shenzhen Hepalink since 2014. No SEC filing and no standalone audited accounts exist. Data-broker revenue estimates (D&B, ZoomInfo type profiles) were deliberately NOT substituted.
blocks: one of this map's six chokepoints carries no figures at all, so the crude-heparin API concentration hypothesis cannot be sized from this map
would_close_it: Shenzhen Hepalink segment disclosure that breaks out SPL separately, or an SPL filing if it ever lists

subject: Lonza Group
sought: Lonza's AUDITED FY2025 consolidated financial statements, for a flagged chokepoint
searched: lonza.com annual report PDF, financials page and guessed report URLs, via both an automated fetch and direct curl; an SGX mirror of Lonza's own Full-Year Results 2025 deck
found_instead: lonza.com returns an Akamai HTTP 403 to every user agent tried. The only reachable document is Lonza's own results deck, whose p.42-43 footnote states the FY2025 figures are UNAUDITED and cover only the continuing CDMO business EXCLUDING the divested CHI segment, with audited statements due in April. Those figures were deliberately NOT merged: a continuing-operations-only number in the same column as 27 total-company numbers is not comparable.
blocks: a flagged chokepoint, and the sterile-injectable/biologics CDMO hypothesis, sits uncosted on a map whose other rows are total-company figures
would_close_it: Lonza's audited 2025 Annual Report once published, or any reachable host serving it

subject: Samsung Biologics
sought: net income, R&D, capex and market cap for Samsung Biologics
searched: the Korean DART electronic disclosure system and Samsung Biologics' own investor-relations site
found_instead: DART was not accessible and the IR site is JavaScript-rendered, which blocked PDF discovery. Only revenue could be sourced, and only at tier 2 from the company newsroom rather than from an audited filing.
blocks: the leading Western-aligned alternative to Chinese biologics CDMOs is only partly costed, which weakens any substitutability comparison against WuXi Biologics
would_close_it: the DART filing for Samsung Biologics' FY2025 audited report, or a non-JS route to its IR PDFs

subject: Cigna (Express Scripts)
searched: Cigna's SEC XBRL companyfacts history for PaymentsToAcquirePropertyPlantAndEquipment and PaymentsForProceedsFromProductiveAssets
found_instead: both concepts stop dead after FY2019 in Cigna's own XBRL history, and no substitute cash-flow capex tag was found. Left empty rather than approximated from a PP&E roll-forward.
blocks: one of the three PBM-layer companies has no capex figure, so capital intensity cannot be compared across that layer
would_close_it: reading the capex line directly off Cigna's 10-K cash-flow statement rather than from XBRL

subject: Catalent
searched: SEC XBRL companyfacts and market data sources
found_instead: Catalent was taken private by Novo Holdings in a deal that closed in December 2024, so no public market price exists. The acquisition consideration was deliberately NOT substituted as a market cap, because it is a transaction price at one date, not a market valuation.
blocks: a CDMO-layer company cannot be size-compared on market cap, only on revenue
would_close_it: nothing, while Catalent remains private. The row is correct as it stands and the gap records why the cell is empty.

subject: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries; Aurobindo Pharma; Cipla
sought: annual R&D spend, capex and market cap for the three large Indian generics and API makers
searched: each company's own audited-results press release and earnings presentation for the year ended 2026-03-31
found_instead: the Indian quarterly results format carries the P&L but not the cash-flow statement or share count. Aurobindo's deck disclosed R&D and capex only QUARTERLY; annualising them was declined as it would have been arithmetic presented as disclosure.
blocks: the API-concentration hypothesis rests partly on these three, and R&D and capital intensity are exactly the measures that would show whether they can absorb re-sourced volume
would_close_it: each company's full annual report for FY2026 once filed with BSE/NSE, which carries the cash-flow statement
